zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Goddard於1425年出生在英國維爾爾傑爾爾時，他的父親John Goddard32歲，母親Jone Wheatley28歲。他和Sybil Mychell Petit至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1490年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Goddard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Godhard, a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The name was popular in Europe during the Middle Ages as a result of the fame of Saint Gotthard, an 11th-century bishop of Hildesheim who founded a hospice on the pass from Switzerland to Italy that bears his name. This surname is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.
English: perhaps occasionally a variant of the occupational name   Gothard  . The two surnames may have been much confused.
French: variant of   Godard  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Gothard
meanings: English: occupational name for a keeper of goats, from Middle English gotherde (Old English gāt ‘goat’ + hierde) ‘herdsman, keeper’.

English: variant of Goater, with excrescent -d, either a topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or ditch, from Middle English gote ‘watercourse’ + the agent suffix -(e)r, or an occupational name either from Middle English gotherde ‘goatherd’ or from Middle English goter ‘goatherd’, an agent derivative of Middle English got(e) ‘goat’ (Old English gāt).

variants.name: Godard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Reynald, Alcide, Armand, Aurel, Celine, Cyprien, Dominique, Emile, Etienne, Euclide, Gilles.
French: from the personal name Godard, of ancient Germanic origin (see Goddard ).

English (of Norman origin): variant of   Goddard  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Goertz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Christoph, Erwin, Guenter, Juergen, Kurt, Otto.
German (also Görtz): patronymic from the personal name Goert, a short form of Godhard (see Goddard ), Gottfried or Gerhardt , common in Rhineland.
Germanized form (also Görtz) of Sorbian Gerc; see Gertz .

variants.name: Goodart
meanings: Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Gothard  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Goddard was born in 1425, in Cherhill, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Goddard, was 32 and his mother, Jone Wheatley, was 28. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Sybil Mychell Petit. He died in 1490, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Goddard est né en 1425, à Cherhill, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John Goddard, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jone Wheatley, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Sybil Mychell Petit. Il est décédé en 1490, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Goddard 1425 in Cherhill, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Goddard 32 und seine Mutter Jone Wheatley 28. Er hatte mit Sybil Mychell Petit mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1490 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Goddard è nato il nel 1425 nel Cherhill, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, John Goddard, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Jone Wheatley, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Sybil Mychell Petit. Morì nel 1490, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Goddard(이)가 1425년 영국 윌츠히르 체힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Goddard(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Jone Wheatley(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Sybil Mychell Petit(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Goddard nasceu em 1425, em Cherhill, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Goddard, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jone Wheatley, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Sybil Mychell Petit. Ele faleceu em 1490, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Goddard родился в 1425 г. в местности чирилл, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Goddard было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jone Wheatley, 28. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Sybil Mychell Petit. Он умер в 1490 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Goddard nació en 1425, en Cherhill, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Goddard, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jone Wheatley, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Sybil Mychell Petit. Murió en 1490, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
